title: Flaky Buttery Mediterranean Pasta Bake
description: A rich and satisfying Mediterranean dish featuring buttery pasta, Sichuan pepper, and a creamy emulsion, perfect for a brunch gathering, and made with halal-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the pasta according to the package instructions until al dente, then set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the garlic until fragrant.
Add the Sichuan pepper to the skillet and stir for one minute.
In a large bowl, whisk together the lemon juice and a quarter cup of the pasta water to create an emulsion.
Add the cooked pasta to the bowl and toss with the emulsion until well coated.
In a separate saucepan, melt the butter over low heat.
Add the feta cheese to the saucepan and stir until smooth and creamy.
In a large baking dish, combine the pasta, cherry tomatoes, and parsley, then top with the cheese sauce.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes or until the top is golden brown.
